/usr/bin/ar qc libemberforge_core.a CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/api/provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/commands/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/tools/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/runtime/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/plugins/plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/plugins/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/telemetry/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/lsp/manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/system/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emberforge_core.dir/src/compat/upstream_paths.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libemberforge_core.a
